headline: Hasbro (HAS) Stock Fair Value Edges Lower As Analysts Weigh Guidance And Execution Risk
summary: The latest analyst update on Hasbro nudges the fair value estimate slightly lower, from US$113.53 to US$113.07, signaling only a very small adjustment to the price target. This refined view sits alongside a split in Street commentary, where some analysts highlight earnings power and cash generation, while others focus on execution risk and uneven near term profit delivery. As you read on, you will see how these shifting assumptions and opinions shape the evolving Hasbro narrative and what to...
